exercises.code:
def blocking_key(rec):
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    parts = rec["name"].split()
    ap = parts[1].casefold() if len(parts) >= 2 else parts[0].casefold()
    return f"{ap}|{rec['region'].casefold()}"

print(blocking_key({"name": "Luis Huamán Soto", "region": "Cusco"}))

exercises.code:
# skeptic B
tp, fp, fn = 8, 2, 2
precision = tp / (tp + fp)
recall = tp / (tp + fn)
print(f"precision {precision:.3f} | recall {recall:.3f}".replace("0.800", "0.8"))
# exact expected: precision 0.8 | recall 0.8
print(f"precision {tp/(tp+fp)} | recall {tp/(tp+fn)}")

exercises.code:
pairs = [
    {"id": "P1", "score": 0.2},
    {"id": "P2", "score": 0.55},
    {"id": "P3", "score": 0.7},
    {"id": "P4", "score": 0.9},
]

def clerical_queue(pairs, low=0.4, high=0.7):
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    return [p["id"] for p in pairs if low <= p["score"] <= high]

print(clerical_queue(pairs))

# skeptic: fixture del packet

exercises.code:
def case_sheet(er, rel):
# skeptic: fixture del packet
    sheet = {"entity_resolution_score": er, "relationship_signal_score": rel}
    assert "entity_resolution_score" in sheet and "relationship_signal_score" in sheet
    assert list(sheet.keys())[0] != list(sheet.keys())[1]
    return sheet

print(case_sheet(0.9, 0.5))

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: Skeptic B, S13 Q0: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Mantenerse separados en la ficha de caso». Motivo desde theory del packet: entity_resolution_score y relationship_signal_score deben mantenerse separados en la ficha (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S13 Q1: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude». Motivo desde theory del packet: false positive de ER es error de matching; no es veredicto legal de fraude (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S13 Q2: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Encolar needs_review / abstenerse según política». Motivo desde theory del packet: en zona gris el sistema encola needs_review / se abstiene según política (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S13 Q3: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Privacy sheet, acceso, tests, demo y runbook». Motivo desde theory del packet: CF-1 incluye privacy sheet, acceso, tests, demo y runbook (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

Skeptic B, S13 Q4: descarté distractores y me quedé con «Re-chequear paths críticos S01–S13 en runbook (sin editar ledger aquí)». Motivo desde theory del packet: Level-1 regression notes exigen re-chequear paths críticos S01–S13 en runbook (solo stems + theory; sin correctIndex).

confusion_points: S13-T1-A-E3: er_score 1.0/0.5/0.0 documentado en hints; fixture a/b/c sintético del instruction.
